title: Rocks The Potty
headline: For Those Who Party Hard... In the Bathroom
caption:
Because why rock the party when you can rock the potty? This shirt says it all for those proud of their bathroom escapades. Check it out here: https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/rocks+the+potty?idea=5d89cbe0b4b8c76e3916d6e4 Reply if you get the reference.

#ToiletHumor #RockThePotty
